category_sources: Official README states nmrpflash uses Netgear's NMRP protocol to flash firmware to compatible devices.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading uses nmrpflash.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents usage, options, supported devices, and firmware flashing workflow.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/jclehner/nmrpflash; per instruction, not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official README describes NMRP firmware flashing and supported Netgear devices.
